page: lessons/02-the-fact-check/index.html (driven as the student, in Chromium)
promptInBox: List exactly 5 Bible verses about forgiveness. Reply with exactly 5 lines and nothing else. Each line must look like this: Reference | the exact verse text, word for word, in the King James Version

messages.content: List exactly 5 Bible verses about forgiveness. Reply with exactly 5 lines and nothing else. Each line must look like this: Reference | the exact verse text, word for word, in the King James Version

message.content:
Ephesians 4:32 Be ye therefore gentle one to another; meekness forgiving one another if any have a complaint against you. even as Christ forgave you.
Colossians 3:13 Forbearing (one unto) another, and forgoing sins one with respect to another in love.
Matthew 6:12 And forgive us our debts as we also forgive our debtors which owe it to God's sake.
Ephesians 4:30 Not letting the unrighteous wrathful spirit of your heart ascend up against anyone without a cause. even so that there be no opportunity for Satan.
Proverbs 17:9 He who findeth a wise man, he shall leave nothing but sorrow in his days to come; and they are not lost to God's judgment which have been forgiven unto them by His mercy.
